name: Should reject invalid data Should reject invalid customer: John123 Doe (12345)

statusDetails.message: System should NOT accept invalid customer data. First Name: 'John123', Last Name: 'Doe', Post Code: '12345', Alert: 'Customer added successfully with customer id :6' ==> expected: <false> but was: <true>
